issue_body:
My test environment is OpenSSL 3.1.1 on Fedora.
James Muir reports it fails on the "master" branch.  (2023-Nov-27)

The example is a ctx that is ready but hasn't been used yet.

Calling EVP_MAC_init() fixes the problem.

Example file is a .txt because the web form said it didn't like .c
[bug.c.txt](https://github.com/openssl/openssl/files/13483202/bug.c.txt)
pr_title: evp-cmac: do not seg-fault when getting mac-size before init
pr_body:
Add null check to avoid seg-fault encountered with cmac when `EVP_MAC_CTX_get_mac_size()` is called before init.

Extend mac testing in `evp_test.c` to check that the sizes returned by `EVP_MAC_CTX_get_mac_size()` before and after init make sense (this also checks that we no longer seg-fault).

Fixes #22842
